L2.method: A* pixel-perfect sim, cross-shaped enemy targets

key_mechanics: Pixel-perfect collision (not AABB) - sprites have transparent pixels
Push animation resolves within single env.step() (base game loops internally)
Pushed box slides 5 frames * 3px = 15px min, continues on gulch
Bombs consume 1 row per action, explode when all consumed, then reset
Explosion pushes nearby objects based on bomb rotation
Win: all rktpmjcpkt covered by xlfuqjygey, all ucjzrlvfkb covered by nnckfubbhi
